headline: Probolinggo flood causes minor coastal road-access damage
summary: Banjir di Probolinggo menyebabkan genangan kawasan permukiman pesisir dan kerusakan ringan pada akses jalan lingkungan.
summary_id: Banjir di Probolinggo menyebabkan genangan kawasan permukiman pesisir dan kerusakan ringan pada akses jalan lingkungan.
summary_en: Flooding in Probolinggo caused inundation in coastal residential areas and minor damage to neighborhood road access.
